case_title: BENEFICIAL OF CALIFORNIA, INC. VS MILTON, ROBERT E.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,802.28 FILED BY BENEFICIAL OF CALIFORNIA, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MILTON, ROBERT E. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-06-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BENEFICIAL OF CALIFORNIA, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MILTON, ROBERT E. $1,801.16 PRINCIPAL, $55.82 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,856.98, DEFT TO PAY PLFT $140 BY 10/22/97; $140 BY 11/22/9 & $70 EACH MONTH BEGINNING 12/22/97 UNTIL JUDGMENT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MILTON, ROBERT E.
